parse.title: Abyssal Mask
parse.wikitext:
: ''For the removed [[item]], see {{ii|Abyssal Scepter}}.''
: ''For the removed {{ai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item, see {{ii|Infernal Mask}}.''
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency =
|similaritems = Force of Nature;Spirit Visage;Hollow Radiance;Kaenic Rookern;Bloodletter's Curse;Void Staff;Cryptbloom;Frozen Heart
|notes =
* The visual indicator of the reduction lasts up to 60 seconds, despite the debuff lasting indefinitely against champions as long as they are within {{sbc|Unmake's}} aura.{{bug}}
|strategy =

|media =

|patchhistory = 
;[[V25.08]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} No longer is displayed under the Ability Power filter in the shop.

;[[V25.04]]
* Magic resistance reduced to 45 from 50.

;[[V25.S1.1]]
* Health increased to 350 from 300.
* Magic resistance increased to 50 from 45.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Unmake:}}
** {{sbc|New Effect:}} Enemy champions within {{tt|700 units|center to edge}} of you become cursed, causing them to receive {{as|12% increased magic damage|magic damage}} from all sources.
** {{sbc|Old Effect:}} Enemy champions within {{tt|700 units|center to edge}} of you become cursed, {{as|reducing their magic resistance by 30%|magic penetration}}.
* No longer limits the user to 1 {{sbc|Blight}} item.
* Now limits the user to 1 '''Abyssal Mask'''.

;[[V14.19]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|2650}} from {{g|2500}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|1000}} from {{g|800}}.
* Ability haste increased to 15 from 10.
* Magic resistance reduced to 45 from 50.
* {{sbc|Removed:}} Unmake no longer grants {{as|10 magic resistance}} per cursed enemy.

;[[V14.15]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|2500}} from {{g|2300}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|800}} from {{g|600}}.
* Unmake magic resistance reduction increased to 30% from 20%.
* Unmake radius increased to 700 units from 600.

;[[V14.10]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2300}} from {{g|2400}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|600}} from {{g|700}}.
* Magic resistance reduced to 50 from 60.
* Unmake radius increased to 600 from 550.
* Unmake magic resistance reduction changed to {{as|20%|magic penetration}} from {{as|5|magic penetration}} {{as|(+ {{fd|1.2}}% of user's '''bonus''' health)}}, capped at a reduction of 25.
* Unmake bonus magic resistance per enemy increased to 10 from 9.
* Now limits the user to 1 {{sbc|Blight}} item.

;[[V13.11]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} No longer causes enemy champions' {{ii|Rod of Ages}} to not function properly.

;[[V13.10]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Kindlegem}} + {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{g|700}} = {{g|2400}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Catalyst of Aeons}} + {{ii|Spectre's Cowl}} + {{g|450}} = {{g|3000}}.
* {{sbc|New Stats:}} 300 health, 60 magic resistance, 10 ability haste.
** {{sbc|Old Stats:}} 550 health, 300 mana, 40 magic resistance, 10 ability haste.
* Limited to 1 '''Abyssal Mask''' instead of 1 {{sbc|Eternity}} item.
* {{sbc|Removed Unique Passive - Eternity:}} Restore {{as|mana}} equal to 7% of {{tt|pre-mitigation damage|Damage calculated before modifiers}} taken from champions, and {{tip|heal}} for an amount equal to {{as|25% of mana spent}}, up to 20 per cast. Toggled abilities can only heal for up to 20 per second.

;[[V13.7]]
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|450}} from {{g|650}}.
** Total cost unchanged.
* Health increased to 550 from 500.

;[[V13.1]]
* Mana restored reduced to 7% pre-mitigation damage taken from 8%.
* Heal increased to 25% of mana spent from 20%.
* Heal cap increased to 20 from 15.

;[[V12.22]]
* Updated icon.
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Catalyst of Aeons}} + {{ii|Spectre's Cowl}} + {{g|650}} = {{g|3000}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Kindlegem}} + {{ii|Spectre's Cowl}} + {{g|650}} = {{g|2700}}.
* Health increased to 500 from 450.
* Mana increased to 300 from 0.
* Magic resistance increased to 40 from 35.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive - Eternity:}} Restore {{as|mana}} equal to 8% of {{tt|pre-mitigation damage|Damage calculated before modifiers}} taken from champions, and {{as|health}} equal to {{as|20% of mana spent}}, up to {{as|15 health}} per cast. Toggled abilities can only heal for up to {{as|15|health}} per second.
* Limited to 1 {{sbc|Eternity}} item.

;[[V12.11]]
* Magic resistance increased to 35 from 30.
* Bonus magic resistance per cursed champion increased to 9 from 7.

;[[V12.7]]
* Unmake health ratio increased to {{as|{{fd|1.2}}% '''bonus''' health}} from {{as|1%|health}}.
* Unmake maximum magic resistance reduction increased to 25 from 20.

;[[V11.23]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Kindlegem}} + {{ii|Spectre's Cowl}} + {{g|650}} = {{g|2700}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Giant's Belt}} + {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{g|900}} = {{g|2700}}.
* Health increased to 450 from 400.
* Magic resistance reduced to 30 from 60.
* Ability haste increased to 10 from 0.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Unmake:}}
** {{sbc|New Effect:}} Nearby enemy champions become cursed, reducing their {{as|magic resistance by 5}} {{as|(+ 1% '''bonus''' health)}}, capped at a reduction of {{as|20 magic resistance}}. Gain {{as|7 '''bonus''' magic resistance}} per cursed enemy. Champions can only be afflicted by one curse at a time, prioritizing the most potent curse.
** {{sbc|Old Effect:}} {{tip|immobilize|Immobilizing}} enemy champions increases the damage they take by 15% for 5 seconds.

;[[V11.14]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Debuff icon now properly displays in the buff bar.

;[[V11.10]]
* Health increased to 400 from 350.
* Unmake bonus damage increased to 15% from 10%.
* Unmake duration increased to 5 seconds from 4.

;[[V10.24]]
* Updated icon.

;[[V10.23]]
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Giant's Belt}} + {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{g|900}} = {{g|2700}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 350 health, 60 magic resistance.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Unmake:}} {{tip|Immobilize|Immobilizing}} an enemy champion increases the damage they take by 10% for 4 seconds.
** Limited to 1 '''Abyssal Mask'''.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Catalyst of Aeons}} + {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{g|1180}} = {{g|3000}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 350 health, 55 magic resistance, 10% cooldown reduction, 300 mana.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Eternity:}} Restore {{as|mana}} equal to 15% of damage taken from champions. Restore {{as|health}} equal to 20% of mana spent, up to 25 health per cast, while toggle abilities can heal for up to 25 per second.
** {{sbc|Unique Aura:}} Nearby enemy champions take {{as|15% more magic damage|magic damage}} ({{tt|325|edge to center}} range).
** {{cai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item: {{ii|Infernal Mask}}.
*** {{sbc|Stats:}} 750 health, 100 magic resistance, 10% cooldown reduction, 300 mana.

;[[V9.8]]
* {{ii|Infernal Mask}} magic resistance increased to 100 from 90.
* {{ii|Infernal Mask}} health increased to 750 from 550.

;[[V9.1]]
* {{ii|Infernal Mask}}
** Total cost reduced to {{g|3000}} from {{g|4000}}.
*** Combine cost reduced to {{g|0}} from {{g|1000}}.
** Can now only be obtained if {{ci|Ornn}} forges the item (for himself or for another ally).

;[[V8.9]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|3000}} from {{g|2900}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|1180}} from {{g|1080}}.
* {{ii|Infernal Mask}} total cost increased to {{g|4000}} from {{g|3900}}.

;[[V8.7]]
* Aura range type changed to ''edge to center'' from {{tip|cr|center to center}}.

;[[V8.6]]
* Aura range reduced to {{tip|cr|325}} from {{tip|er|700}}.
* Aura bonus magic damage increased to 15% from 10%.
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} No longer counts as a spell for the purposes of {{ri|Electrocute|Electrocute's}} or {{ri|Phase Rush|Phase Rush's}} 3 unique spell requirement.

;[[V7.17]]
* Added to recipe from {{ii|Infernal Mask}}. ''Only available while {{ci|Ornn}} is on your team.''

;[[V7.13]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Catalyst of Aeons}} + {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{g|1080}} = {{g|2900}}
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Spectre's Cowl}} + {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{g|880}} = {{g|2800}}
* Base health regeneration reduced to 0% from 100%.
* Health increased to 350 from 300.
* Mana increased to 300 from 0.
* Magic resistance reduced to 55 from 65.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive - Eternity:}} 15% of damage taken from champions is gained as mana. Spending mana restores 20% of mana spent as health, up to 25 per cast (toggle spells heal for up to 25 per second).

;[[V7.12]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Aura range indicator now represents the actual range.

;[[V7.11]]
* Renamed to {{ii|Abyssal Mask}} from {{ii|Abyssal Scepter}}.
* Item icon updated.
* {{ii|Abyssal Mask}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Spectre's Cowl}} + {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{g|880}} = {{g|2800}}
** +300 health
** +65 magic resist
** +100% base health regeneration
** +10% cooldown reduction
** {{sbc|Unique Aura:}} Nearby enemy champions take 10% more magic damage (500 range)
}}
